title: in-the-loop project config
description: Per-project configuration read by in-the-loop skills. Lives at .in-the-loop.json in the project root.

docs.description: Paths to the project's typed durable docs. Omit any the project doesn't use; skills skip absent slots.

verify.description: Project verify command (build/test/lint) run by finishing-check. Must exit non-zero on failure.

invariants.description: Project-specific text invariants enforced by finishing-check and glossary-guard.

in.description: Path or glob to search within. Defaults to repo root.

must.description: Whether matches are a failure (absent) or required (present).

layers.description: Which optional planning layers the project uses.

work_docs.description: Persist per-milestone build scratch docs. Off by default — ship-milestone derives deltas from drift-check instead.
